basic_details.job_title: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Bharathiar University has released the official Project Assistant Notification 2026 at b-u.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with an M.Sc. in Chemistry with at least 55% marks can apply through email on or before 03 August 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

qualification.details: M.Sc. in Chemistry with 55% marks. Qualified in CSIR/GATE examination is preferable.

salary_details.details: Rs.37,000/- + HRA 20% or Rs.30,000/- + HRA 20% Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 03-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Overview
Bharathiar University Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Bharathiar University Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Applications

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 03-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Bharathiar University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 03 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Chemistry with a minimum of 55% marks. A CSIR/GATE qualification is preferable.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Assistant post announced by Bharathiar University in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 37,000 per month, plus HRA at 20%.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Make sure to follow the instructions carefully for submission.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant role will primarily involve an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the duration of the project for which the Project Assistant will be hired?
faq.answer: The project duration is until 13 February 2027, as indicated in the important dates.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Bharathiar University located?
faq.answer: Bharathiar University is located in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 641046.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with a GATE qualification apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who have qualified in the GATE examination are preferred for this position, in addition to the M.Sc. qualification.
